      "title": "How to get reasoning summary using GPT-5-mini in Agent SDK - API",
      "content": "# How to get reasoning summary using GPT-5-mini in Agent SDK. When using GPT-5-mini via the **Response** API, it’s easy to get reasoning summary text from the returned response object. I scan the outputs in result.output for type == ‘reasoning’, and the text describing reasoning done is in output.summary. I can’t find any way to get the reasoning summary when using the same model in the **agent** SDK. I’ve run a variety of cases that give responses that are good and must require reasoning effort with results always as described. model_settings= ModelSettings(reasoning=Reasoning(effort=\"low\", summary=\"detailed\")),. if o.type=='reasoning' and o.summary:. When I first tried it without that there was no reasoning summary result. When doing [function calling](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/function-calling) with a reasoning model in the [Responses API](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/api-reference/responses), we highly recommend you pass back any reasoning items returned with the last function call (in addition to the output of your function). See our [model documentation](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/models) to check which reasoning models support summaries.
